text: Dear Aarav O'Connor & Sons <QA> ,
className: t m0 x5 h6 yc ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: Greetings from VJC Overseas….!
className: t m0 x5 h6 yd ff4 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: With reference to the rounds of interview, we at VJC Overseas, feel glad to offer you the position
className: t m0 x5 h6 ye ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: of  Lead Full-Stack Engineer - at our Koramangala – Bengaluru, Karnataka Office.
className: t m0 x5 h6 yf ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls5 ws0

text: Your starting date will be on 03 August 2026 at 09:45 AM at our Koramangala – Bengaluru, Karnataka office.
className: t m0 x5 h7 y11 ff5 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: The Appointment Letter from VJC Overseas will be given only after producing the documents of
className: t m0 x5 h6 y15 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: identification, qualifications and experience. The list of the documents has given below:
className: t m0 x5 h6 y16 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0
t m2 x5 h9 y17 ff3 fs5 fc1 sc0 lsc ws0

text: Proof of Date of Birth and Proof of residence.
className: t m0 x9 h6 y17 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0
t m2 x5 h9 y18 ff3 fs5 fc1 sc0 lsc ws0

text: Two passport size photographs (Coloured).
className: t m0 x9 h6 y18 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0
t m2 x5 h9 y19 ff3 fs5 fc1 sc0 lsc ws0

className: t m0 x9 h6 y19 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0
t m2 x5 h9 y1a ff3 fs5 fc1 sc0 lsc ws0

text: VJC Overseas is a service-oriented company with its core business focused on offering Immigration
className: t m0 x5 h6 y1e ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: services  such  as  Visit  Visas,  PR,  and  Study  Abroad  courses  for  various  countries.  To  ensure  the
className: t m0 x5 h6 y1f ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: continued success of the company, every team member is expected to meet the minimum sales
className: t m0 x5 h6 y20 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: targets assigned by their respective Branch Managers.
className: t m0 x5 h6 y21 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: VJC Overseas is one of the most reputed companies in India and retains the sole rights to make
className: t m0 x5 h6 y22 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: decisions regarding employee salaries. We appreciate your dedication and contribution to making
className: t m0 x5 h6 y23 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: VJC Overseas a trusted brand in the industry.
className: t m0 x5 h6 y24 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: The employee is giving consent for background check to be initiated by VJC Overseas after the
className: t m0 x5 h6 y25 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: selection process.
className: t m0 x5 h6 y26 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: Code of conduct
className: t m0 x5 h7 y27 ff5 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0
t m4 x5 hb y28 ff5 fs5 fc1 sc0 lsd ws0

text: Probation period
className: t m0 xb h7 y28 ff5 fs5 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: 1.1. Your employment will be subjected to a probationary period of 6 months, counted from the
className: t m0 x5 hd y29 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: date of your joining. In case of leaving the company during probation, you are required to serve a
className: t m0 x5 h6 y2a ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: notice period of 1 month. However, if your performance is deemed to be satisfactory during the
className: t m0 x5 h6 y2b ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: mentioned span of time,  you will be given a written confirmation of you being a member of the
className: t m0 x5 h6 y2c ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: established staff of the company. As an employee, you are required to serve a notice period of 1
className: t m0 x5 h6 y2d ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0

text: month, in case of leaving the company.
className: t m0 x5 h6 y2e ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls0 ws0
